title: Cancel an external company
description: Tell CAIPO that an external (foreign) company is no longer doing business in Barbados.
summary: Under Section 338 of the Companies Act, an external company must tell the Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office when it stops doing business in Barbados.
The notice of cancellation removes the company from the register of external companies.

items: the address of the registered office in Barbados
the names and addresses of the directors
the date the company stopped doing business in Barbados

items.name: Statement of accounts up to the cancellation date
Photo ID for the signing officer
Proof of payment of the filing fee

fees: Filing fees are set by CAIPO. Confirm before you submit.
how_long: A decision usually takes 4 to 6 weeks.

options.heading: Through an attorney-at-law
content: A Barbadian attorney-at-law will file the notice with CAIPO.

contact.agency: Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office (CAIPO)
contact.address:
Baobab Tower, Ground Floor
Warrens
St. Michael
